title: This gaming mouse is equipped with a teeny Noctua fan.
summary: The Feinmann F01 Noctua Edition is made in collaboration with peripheral maker Pulsar Gaming Gears, and like other fan-equipped mice , is designed to cool sweaty palms during intense gaming sessions.
